message:
🐛 Fix loading spinner staying on after refresh completes

Simplified isClusterLoading to only return true when refreshing is active.
This keeps the left status indicator and right refresh button in sync.

Previously, the left spinner would keep spinning if nodeCount was undefined
even after the refresh completed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
